$metadata.author: Usman Hussain
$metadata.scope: Machine-readable P-40 through P-45 parameter amendment draft.
$metadata.title: Phase 6.5 Composer Parameter Amendment v1

parameters.name: organization graph depth limit
parameters.description: Limits Composer-authored organization graph depth; exact value belongs only in ratified Blueprint Appendix A.

parameters.name: per-tenant active workflow limit
parameters.description: Limits active Composer workflows per tenant.

parameters.name: composition-version retention
parameters.description: Controls retention of historical CompositionVersion records.

parameters.name: delegation-abandonment timer
parameters.description: Controls fallback timing for abandoned delegated stages.

parameters.name: budget-warning threshold
parameters.description: Controls budget warning threshold for Composer cost honesty.
